proof_relaxations: every canonical quotient word with continuant p has weighted cost at most 404
suffix continuant of remaining weighted cost d is below 2^d
prefix coefficient sum t+t_next is at most 2^cost, hence B is explicitly bounded
p < 2*r*t_next and the suffix bound give an explicit lower bound on decoder label A
all relaxed prefix lengths, current quotient weights, and four phase positions are enumerated

semantics.len_update_lrp: covers both remainder fields and decoder label A=bit_length(t_next)+2 at an iteration boundary
semantics.len_update_lt: covers both coefficient fields and decoder label B=n+3-bit_length(r) at an iteration boundary
semantics.quotient_swap: selector J=ell_t+ell_q+1; gate additionally exposes Work[J+1]
semantics.ranges: inclusive 1-based physical Work labels; null means block is unreachable at that step

shift_register_requirement.minimum_exact_steps_reason: continuant p is below 2^sum_weights, so sum_weights>=256; x=1 attains 256
shift_register_requirement.warning: the existing 9-bit l_s wraps after 511 and cannot canonicalize 592 physical rotations modulo 259
